label: Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics

node.label: Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics
node.definition: Benchmarks and task metrics define datasets, protocols, scoring rules, baselines, uncertainty, and reporting conventions for comparable evaluation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Benchmarks, test suites & task metrics is to connect Datasets, sampling & splits, Statistics & experimental design to downstream capabilities including LLM-as-judge & automated critique, Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation, Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation.
examples: substrate for Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation
substrate for Robustness, distribution shift & OOD evaluation
limitations: Coverage is necessarily incomplete: measured proxies, policies, and test suites cannot enumerate every deployment context or adversary. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Statistics & experimental design.
